name: Marek
backstory: Discharged from a count's levy after the company was broken at Greyford. He keeps a small notched coin from a man he killed at sixteen and does not speak of why.

name: Roselle
backstory: Grew up running goods over the Frostmark border for her uncle. The work taught her where to step and when not to look back. She owes the uncle money.

name: Imogen
backstory: A novice of the Sevrenne cult who was sent down from the cloister for asking the wrong question. She still wears the rope belt under her shirt out of habit.

name: Dren
backstory: Served two terms in the Lowmark riders and walked away with a stiff knee and a cold opinion of officers. The fort feeds him; that is enough.

name: Veska
backstory: Read accounts for a Lowmark merchant house for nine years before the houses' books got too clean to look at. She prefers numbers to people and is rarely fooled twice.
